column1: Luis Arraez leads the slate with elite hit consistency, reaching safely in over 77% of games and benefiting from the leadoff spot at home with a favorable lefty-righty matchup against Reynaldo López. Yandy Diaz offers a strong alternative, riding a hot stretch and batting atop the order in a hitter-friendly park. Xavier Edwards and Otto Lopez also bring steady profiles, but Arraez’s reliability and matchup make him the top choice for Beat The Streak.
